mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_reservation.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO reservation(res_no, guest_id, space_no, unit_no, res_date, start_time, end_time, people_count, total_price, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{res_no}, #{guest_id}, #{space_no}, #{unit_no}, #{res_date}, #{start_time}, #{end_time}, #{people_count}, #{total_price}, 'PENDING', SYSDATE, null)
mapper.select: SELECT res_no, guest_id, space_no, unit_no, res_date, start_time, end_time, people_count, total_price, status, created_at, updated_at FROM reservation WHERE res_no = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET status = #{status}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE res_no = #{res_no}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment(payment_no, res_no, pay_method, pay_amount, pay_status, pay_date, pg_tid, used_point) VALUES(seq_payment.NEXTVAL, #{res_no}, #{method}, #{totalAmount}, 'PAID', SYSDATE, #{paymentKey}, 0)
